'''Caal Jordan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who worked for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he was assigned to [[Hrakert Station]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] where he developed a [[Sonic emitter/Legends|sonic weapon]] for use against [[Firaxan shark/Legends|Firaxan sharks]]. After his development, he requested a raise for his accomplishments, but was [[Death/Legends|killed]] shortly after by the insane [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
